notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes grounds into a double play, third baseman David Hamilton to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. Brandon Valenzuela out at 2nd. Nathan Lukes out at 1st.
